name: Side Street Inn (Kapahulu)
tagline: Where Honolulu's best chefs eat on their nights off — the pan-fried pork chops and signature fried rice are legendary for a reason.
parking: Small lot behind building, street parking on side streets
talkStory: Colin Nishida opened this second Side Street Inn on Kapahulu in 2010 to serve the Kaimuki/Kapahulu crowd. Same legendary pork chops and massive fried rice as the original Hopaka St location, but with a bigger dining room and easier parking. The Kapahulu spot draws more families early evening while the original stays late-night chef territory. Same menu, same portions that could feed a football team.
